market_context: Crypto account remains USDT-cash dominant. BTC buyback is not triggered until stabilization above 75,500-76,000.

staged_actions.action: Buy back 300 USDT BTC only after BTC stabilizes above 75,500.
Add another 300 USDT BTC only after further confirmation near or above 76,000.

soft_stop: Do not buy if stabilization fails after crossing 75,500.
hard_stop: No automated execution and no buy below the trigger zone.
rebound_action: If BTC rebounds into confirmation zone, require manual review and order evidence before recording execution.
risk_notes: Do not add ETH, SOL, DOGE, or ZEC spot as substitutes.
This plan is a ledger record, not an automated trading instruction.
validation_requirements: Latest Binance visible account state must be confirmed.
Manual order evidence is required before recording an executed buyback.
Runtime validation must pass after any record update.
